name: Blackberry Blackheads
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F with an adult's help.
2. Beat the 1/2 pound butter until creamy. Add sugar, a little at a time, until all the sugar has been used.
3. Add the egg whites and flour to the butter and sugar mixture. Beat until the dough is well blended.
4. Dip a pastry brush into the 1 tablespoon of butter and lightly brush a very thin layer onto the cookie sheet.
5. With clean hands, roll the dough into golf ball-sized balls. Flatten the balls slightly, and using your thumb, press a dime-sized dent into the middle of each one. Place cookies, with the dents facing up, about 1 inch apart on the cookie sheet.
6. Bake for about 12 minutes or until set.
7. Allow the cookies to cool on the cookie sheet for a few minutes before moving them to a wire rack with a spatula.
8. When the cookies are completely cooled, use a small spoon to fill each dent with jam.
Makes about 3 1/2 dozen blackheads.
